历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group were approximately 4089 → 5874 → 5321 → 18725 → 5471. Rankings fluctuated between 4000 and 5900 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, a severe gap occurred in the first batch B segment (18725), but in 2025 (Physics Category), it quickly recovered to 5471, returning to normal levels. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5471. The provincial science group plan was 43 in 2021 → 57 in 2022 → 51 in 2023 → 60 in 2024 → 59 in 2025, showing an overall expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 60, a slight increase of 1 (+1.7%) from 59 in 2025, with minimal expansion having limited effect on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science Chinese University main ranking has risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2026, there are no negative public records related to Minzu University of China. Douyin popularity ranks 80th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, without high attention or negative public impact. In 2024, the science group experienced a gap (first batch B segment), but it quickly recovered in 2025, with the lag effect of the gap basically subsiding. Ethnology is A+ (top nationally), Chinese Language and Literature is A-, Sociology is A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer-related majors are moderately popular (rated 'recommended' in 2026), Electronics/Communication majors are highly popular and recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly popular and recommended, all being current popular engineering directions. In 2026, the total number of provincial college entrance exam takers is about 154,000. Estimating about 72% as Physics Category candidates, there are about 110,800 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 32.4% from 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates. The university enrolls 60 students in the Inner Mongolia science group, making it one of the 985 universities in Beijing with a relatively large number of slots in Inner Mongolia, with regional preference positively affecting application heat. Among the science enrollment majors, there are no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, but engineering majors like Computer and Electronics, though not rated as A-class, benefit from the overall 985 platform and Beijing's regional advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has recovered from the gap to normal levels (5471), the 2026 plan only slightly expands by 1 (+1.7%), the provincial Physics Category candidates increase significantly by about 32.4%, the school's Soft Science ranking continues to rise (79th), and popular engineering majors (Computer/Electronics/Electrical) have high social popularity, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with rankings slightly shifting backward. The predicted lowest ranking is about 5607, with a range of 5107–6107.
